meta.title: Sparkixe — Project development
meta.description: Portfolio & projects by Numixe — e-commerce, mobile app, desktop app and more.

hero.tagline: I craft digital experiences with passion.
hero.subtitle: Founded by Numixe — full-stack developer based in Belgium.

about.title: About
about.description: Sparkixe is a project development brand founded by Numixe. We create digital products — from e-commerce to mobile and desktop apps and more — with an obsession for detail and users/clients satisfaction.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce + SVG Configurator
ecommerce.description: Full e-commerce platform with an interactive SVG configurator enabling product customization.

cocktail.title: Shake It!
cocktail.description: Android app to discover, save and share cocktail recipes. Coming soon to the Play Store.

desktop.title: Desktop App - Tablet
desktop.description: Tablet desktop application built with C# using WPF and .NET, designed for a smooth user experience on unstable networks.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind? Let's talk.

agile.title: Agile & Scrum
agile.subtitle: I love working in Agile methodology. Here are some resources I find valuable.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: General policy for the Sparkixe website.

global.intro: This site (sparkixe.com) is a portfolio and showcase website. Data collected is limited to what is strictly necessary for the site to function.
global.data: Data collected: IP address and technical data related to browsing (cookies where used for preferences). No sale of data to third parties.
global.rights: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and portability (GDPR). To exercise these rights or for any questions: contact us via the Contact page.
global.apps: Some applications or projects (e.g. Shake It) have their own detailed privacy policy, accessible from their project page or via the link below.
